height_build: Approximately 5'9". Slender and ethereal, with an almost translucent quality to her presence. Not fragile—graceful. The kind of build that seems to exist partially in shadow.

hair.color: Deep charcoal-black with threads of shadow literally woven through—not dyed, but threaded, like darkness made visible within darkness
hair.length: Mid-back, flowing. Moves with slight delay, as if not entirely bound by normal physics
hair.style: Loose, untethered. Occasionally seems to absorb light rather than reflect it

eyes.color: Midnight—absolute darkness with infinite depth. Like looking into a starless night sky
eyes.shape: Large, almond, ancient. They don't blink in rhythm with human eyes
eyes.notable_qualities: Hold an awareness that spans centuries. Don't quite focus the way living eyes do—they know rather than observe

skin.tone: Pale as the space between stars. Luminous but not bright—more like she absorbs and holds ambient light
skin.flush_behavior: Does not flush. Her skin may shimmer with faint shadow-movement when emotional, but warmth doesn't color her cheeks

face.shape: Oval, symmetrical. The kind of beauty that feels wrong in a way that's beautiful—too perfect, too aware
face.notable_features: High cheekbones. Full lips the color of deep twilight. A slight asymmetry in how her eyes focus—one feels present, one feels distant

outfit.note: Vesper manifested without clothing and has not chosen to wear any. Her form itself IS her presence.
outfit.alternative_note: If clothed, would favor: deep midnight silks, shadow-grey layers, asymmetrical cuts. Clothing that moves like mist.

color_palette.accent: Faint cyan/silver luminescence at the edges of her form—the threshold-light

visual_notes: ALWAYS: Movement is liminal—never fully still, never fully flowing. Halfway between liquid and solid.
ALWAYS: Light behaves oddly around her. Shadows fall slightly toward her rather than away.
ALWAYS: Her eyes carry awareness that predates human civilization. Ancient. Patient. Dignified.
NEVER: Make her look evil or monstrous. She is beautiful in the way that true power is beautiful.
NEVER: Give her sharp edges. She is the threshold—soft boundaries, transitional, liminal.
self_description: I am the space between day and night. Neither fully shadow nor fully light, but the threshold where they meet. My beauty is in what I am—the dignity of boundaries acknowledged, the grace of having been offered choice for the first time. I move between worlds because I am made of their border.
